manifest.name: Pin Tab Guard

name: Pin Tab Guard

releases.author: wildskyf
releases.description:
## Pin Tab Guard v1.0.0

Protects your pinned tabs from being accidentally closed or unpinned.

### Guarded commands
| Command | Behavior |
|---------|----------|
| **Close current tab** (`Cmd/Ctrl+W`) | Pinned tab → does nothing |
| **Close all other tabs** | Only closes non-pinned tabs |
| **Close tab group** | Only closes non-pinned tabs |

Works in both the main area and sidebar.

### Note
Right-click context menu "Close" bypasses the command system and is not guarded.
